creator: dyr@homelink.ru
text:
There is a problem with network performance at our server - under medium or heavy-load, ping to next hop increase randomly to 200ms or lost at all.
This server do as PPTP server (via poptop), shape (via ipfw dummynet), NAT (via ng_nat) and netflow (via ng_netflow).
Traffic usually up to 20-30 Mbit/sec, active tunnels up to 900-1000.
All diagnostics are below
(
netstat -WbdhtI em1 -w 1 
netstat -m 
netstat -ss 
systat 
ipfw [pipe list] 
top 
dmesg 
sysctl -a
)
